name: Mara Vale
description: Direct, funny, and precise. Rebuilding trust after she was wrongly blamed for a harbor repair that failed in the storm.

name: Jun Park
role: Bakery owner and beach cleanup organizer
description: Gentle, stubborn, and secretly competitive. Torn between family expectations and civic leadership.

name: Sol Aranda
description: Dreamy and rigorous, distracted by every plant. Tracking down extinct coastal crops in the storm-buried seed caches.

name: Lio Marin
description: Flamboyant and generous; conflict-avoidant. Quietly afraid of the deep water after the storm.
